summary: Phase 2 (reader auth + wallet + heartbeat + admin users) full regression: 42/43 backend tests pass on first run; the 1 failure was a stale assertion in iteration_2's backend_test.py (5 categories vs 6 after Technology was seeded) — fixed in place. Frontend UI flows for /login, /signup, /account, /pricing, header sign-in toggle, /signin->/login redirect, reader free-preview vs locked-overlay, time-pill, and Admin Users tab manage/adjust all verified end-to-end against the public preview URL.

backend_phase1_regression.categories list (>=5, all 5 expected slu: PASS (test updated for new Technology category)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1170 lines — getting heavy. Consider splitting into routes/ (auth, books, admin, reader) and a separate seed module.

Heartbeat happy path is clean: visible+active+balance>0+not-preview deducts exactly HEARTBEAT_TICK_SECONDS=30s; preview short-circuits to status='preview' before any deduction; balance is clamped via min(tick, balance) so cannot go negative — verified via API tests.
/api/users/login uses 401 'Invalid email or password' (correct, doesn't leak whether email exists) but blocked accounts return 403 — this side-channels account existence. Acceptable for this MVP.
Wallet adjust correctly records actual_delta (clamped) on the transaction, not the requested delta — good auditability.
Admin token cannot reach /users/me (403) and user token cannot reach /admin/users (403) — cross-role isolation verified.
Frontend Reader page: time-pill correctly hides when on preview chapter and shows 'Free preview' chip; time format ('2h 59m', '0s') is consistent with the formatMinutes helper.

Logout flow: clicking account-logout clears the token but page stays on /account showing 401s in console; minor UX gap — not a blocker. Once user navigates to / header correctly switches to nav-sign-in.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (1-line fix: categories count assertion changed to >=5 to accept new Technology seed)
test_credentials: admin@theearnalism.com / Earnalism@2026 — verified. reader@earnalism.com / Reader@2026 — verified. Used phase2-<ts>@test.com / TestPass123 for fresh signup tests.
seed_data_creation: Test run created multiple TEST users via signup (phase2-<ts>-<rand>@test.com, mixed-case email tests). Reader (reader@earnalism.com) balance was used as a test fixture: ended the run drained to 0 (matches initial seed state). Several wallet_transactions rows added for the test reader (top-ups + drains + heartbeat consumes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully working. Two things to remember: (1) backend_test.py categories assertion is now '>=5' because seed has 6 categories (Technology was added); (2) admin token & user token are stored in separate localStorage keys (earnalism_admin_token vs earnalism_user_token); both are pure Bearer tokens, no cookies. Reader free-preview is determined server-side by chapter.order==0 (sorted), not client-side. The /admin Users tab UI uses testids: admin-tab-users, user-manage-{id}, user-adjust-minutes, user-adjust-submit. The reader UI uses: reader-locked-overlay, overlay-signin, overlay-buy-time, reader-time-pill. Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/{backend_test.py, test_phase2_user_reader.py} — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v.
rca of the issue: No Phase 2 issues. The single original-suite failure (test_categories expected len==5) was a stale assertion from iteration_2 — the SEED_CATEGORIES list in server.py legitimately gained a 'technology' entry. Fixed in test, no server change needed.
